data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete results or outcomes from the simulation of transferring bookings between locations, which is the core focus of the exploratory step. While the linked use case describes a scenario where appointments auto-transfer to the nearest location, there is no evidence that this functionality was tested or confirmed during the exploratory step. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement of validating the transfer of bookings between locations.
gaps: No evidence of successful transfer of bookings between locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
